subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God, Who hath sent forth the Beloved bearing the banners of His signs, and hath made Him a herald from His presence, that He might announce unto all His grace and mercy, which have preceded earth and heaven. He is the One Who [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی ارسل الحبیب برایات الایات و جعله من عنده مبشرا لیبشر الکل بفضله و رحمته التی سبقت الارض و السماء هو الذی
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @power of the Manifestation of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @praise and encouragement, @station of the Manifestation of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @goodly deeds; actions
